text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT WarTranslated RT @AndrewPerpetua : Silence doesn't mean inactivity. Often, it means the forces there are kicking ass. As is the case in Kharkiv, where Khartiia has been quietly holding back Russian assaults. Russia's tactic is to slowly grind down units over time until they eventually break through. We don't want that to happen. We don't want to surrender initiative to the Russians and resort to firefighting measures where we jump around from one crisis to another. We are providing the resources NOW, to stop the crisis before it happens. And to keep stuffing Russians into boxes. Please donate: https://www.paypal.com/donate?campaign_id=RJR9RTMJSAULN We are fundraising to provide Khartiia with critical transport vans. Logistics keeps the front moving. Please support the mission below. You can donate here: https://www.paypal.com/donate?campaign_id=RJR9RTMJSAULN Vehicles are a commodity. We've tracked vehicle losses in Ukraine for years, including light-skinned vehicles such as vans and pickup trucks. Those who follow us know and understand the attrition rates. The scale is immense. In the first 22 days of April alone, we tracked 931 losses in this category (cars, pickups, SUVs, and vans, combined). As our followers know, video analysis captures only a fraction of the total losses. While some of these vehicles are ultimately recovered and repaired, many are abandoned, stripped for parts, or destroyed. This is the reality of war. Support for Ukraine means funding and supplying these vehicles. Why Vans? Cargo In → Casualties Out Inbound: Vans protect sensitive cargo, such as electronics, from dust, mud, and rain. Outbound: Once goods are delivered, these vehicles provide a protected, enclosed space to evacuate the wounded for treatment. The Goal: $100,000 We are raising funds to purchase, repair, and prep vans for Khartiia and another secret special unit. The budget covers the purchase price, mud tires, spare parts, and technical preparation required for front-line deployment. This is the first fundraiser spearheaded by my data collection and mapping project, Ukraine Daily Update, in association with volunteers at Tochnyi. To ensure total transparency and professional logistics, we are partnering with Liberty Ukraine, which will handle the backend and 501(c)(3) status. We know our audience understands the scale of this need. We hope those who are able will donate to help us get these vans to the front as promptly as possible. The fundraiser page is here, with alternative ways to donate: https://www.libertyukraine.org/from-screens-to-the-frontline - Andrew Perpetua tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT WarTranslated 转推 @AndrewPerpetua ：沉默并不意味着不活跃。通常，这意味着那里的部队正在大显身手。哈尔科夫的情况就是如此，Khartiia部队一直在悄悄抵御俄罗斯的进攻。俄罗斯的策略是随着时间的推移慢慢消耗部队，直到最终突破。我们不希望这种情况发生。我们不想把主动权交给俄罗斯人，也不想诉诸于从一个危机跳到另一个危机的救火式措施。我们现在就提供资源，在危机发生前阻止它。并继续把俄罗斯人装进盒子里。请捐款：https://www.paypal.com/donate?campaign_id=RJR9RTMJSAULN 我们正在筹款为Khartiia提供关键的运输货车。后勤保障是前线推进的关键。请支持以下任务。您可以在这里捐款：https://www.paypal.com/donate?campaign_id=RJR9RTMJSAULN 车辆是必需品。多年来，我们一直在追踪乌克兰的车辆损失，包括货车和皮卡等轻型车辆。关注我们的人都知道并了解损耗率。规模是巨大的。仅在四月的前22天，我们就追踪到了931辆此类车辆（汽车、皮卡、SUV和货车总计）的损失。正如我们的关注者所知，视频分析只能捕捉到总损失的一小部分。虽然其中一些车辆最终被回收和修复，但许多被遗弃、拆解零件或被摧毁。这就是战争的现实。支持乌克兰意味着资助和供应这些车辆。为什么是货车？货物进 → 伤员出 入境：货车保护电子产品等敏感货物免受灰尘、泥土和雨水的侵害。出境：货物送达后，这些车辆提供了一个受保护的封闭空间，用于撤离伤员进行治疗。目标：10万美元 我们正在筹集资金为Khartiia和另一个秘密特种部队购买、修理和准备货车。预算涵盖了购买价格、泥地轮胎、备件以及前线部署所需的技术准备。这是我的数据收集和绘图项目“乌克兰每日更新”（Ukraine Daily Update）与Tochnyi志愿者合作发起的首次筹款活动。为了确保完全透明和专业的物流，我们正在与Liberty Ukraine合作，他们将处理后台和501(c)(3)身份。我们知道我们的受众了解这种需求的规模。我们希望有能力的人能够捐款，帮助我们尽快将这些货车送到前线。筹款页面在这里，还有其他捐款方式：https://www.libertyukraine.org/from-screens-to-the-frontline - Andrew Perpetua 推文

text: Open Source Intel NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani declares a "budget crisis," requesting a bailout from the state government and pushing back his deadline for completing the city budget at least 10 days. Mamdani: "We cannot close this deficit with savings alone. We need new revenue, and we need a structural reset in our relationship with the state. That is the only way to meet our legal obligation to pass a balanced budget." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）纽约市长佐兰·马姆达尼（Zohran Mamdani）宣布出现“预算危机”，要求州政府救助，并将完成城市预算的截止日期推迟了至少10天。马姆达尼：“我们不能仅靠储蓄来弥补这一赤字。我们需要新的收入，我们需要在与州政府的关系中进行结构性重置。这是履行我们通过平衡预算的法律义务的唯一途径。” 推文

text: German AfD Leader Alice Weidel: The Americans don’t see anyone at the EU level they can seriously negotiate with. EU officials are perceived as weak and not truly representative of the individual nations.
text_zh: 德国选择党（AfD）领导人爱丽丝·魏德尔（Alice Weidel）：美国人在欧盟层面看不到任何可以认真谈判的对象。欧盟官员被视为软弱，并不能真正代表各个国家。

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump met with oil executives, including Chevron CEO Mike Wirth, at the White House yesterday to discuss the implications of the war with Iran. Per reports, White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, Special Envoy to the Middle East Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner were also present at the meeting. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普昨天在白宫会见了包括雪佛龙首席执行官迈克·沃思（Mike Wirth）在内的石油高管，讨论与伊朗战争的影响。据报道，白宫办公厅主任苏西·怀尔斯（Susie Wiles）、财政部长斯科特·贝森特（Scott Bessent）、中东问题特使史蒂夫·威特科夫（Steve Witkoff）和贾里德·库什纳（Jared Kushner）也出席了会议。 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 According to Kan, President Donald Trump held discussions with oil industry executives on ways to maintain the maritime blockade of the Strait of Hormuz for an extended period, potentially lasting several months if required. Video is made by grok AI https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2049486909693391006/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据Kan报道，唐纳德·特朗普总统与石油行业高管讨论了在必要时可能持续数月之久，长期维持霍尔木兹海峡海上封锁的方法。视频由grok AI制作 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2049486909693391006/video/1 推文

text: Trump and oil companies discussed steps to continue Iran blockade for months if needed. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 特朗普与石油公司讨论了“如有必要，将持续数月”维持对伊朗封锁的措施。来源：路透社

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 U.S. Navy Eyes “Trump-Class” Battleship Purchase in FY 2028 The U.S. Navy plans to request $17 billion from Congress in fiscal year 2028 to fund the first Trump-class battleship, part of efforts to develop a next-generation surface combatant as older cruisers are phased out. The proposed platform is intended to provide expanded capabilities beyond current destroyers. Budget projections indicate the Navy expects to spend approximately $43.5 billion on the battleship program over the next five years. The project remains in development and will depend on congressional approval and future funding decisions. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 美国海军着眼于2028财年购买“特朗普级”战列舰 美国海军计划在2028财年向国会申请170亿美元，用于资助第一艘特朗普级战列舰，这是随着旧巡洋舰退役而开发下一代水面作战舰艇努力的一部分。拟议的平台旨在提供超越现有驱逐舰的扩展能力。预算预测显示，海军预计在未来五年内将在战列舰项目上花费约435亿美元。该项目仍处于开发阶段，将取决于国会的批准和未来的资金决策。 推文

text: Türkiye's Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on EU: There is incredible cooperation potential, we just need to act.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈欧盟：合作潜力巨大，我们只需要采取行动。

text: Türkiye's Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on EU: With individual European countries, our relations are very good. But with the EU as a whole, it’s different.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈欧盟：我们与欧洲个别国家的关系非常好。但与作为一个整体的欧盟相比，情况则不同。

text: Türkiye's Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on EU: There is no political will in the EU to accept Türkiye as a member, even if conditions are met. Sarkoyz killed this in 2007.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈欧盟：欧盟没有接纳土耳其为成员国的政治意愿，即使满足了条件也是如此。萨科齐在2007年扼杀了这一点。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷Axios: U.S. President Trump and senior aides met oil and gas executives at the White House on Tuesday to discuss the energy impact of the Iran war and wider market conditions as gas prices averaged $4.18 per gallon. Attendees included Chevron CEO Mike…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan: U.S. President Trump and oil company executives discussed measures to sustain the maritime blockade of the Strait of Hormuz for months if necessary. @wfwitness

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 A high-ranking Iranian security source told Press TV that the U.S. naval blockade on Iran's ports will soon be met with "practical and unprecedented military action." tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 一位伊朗高级安全消息人士告诉新闻电视台（Press TV），美国对伊朗港口的封锁很快将遭到“实际且前所未有的军事行动”的回应。 推文

text: Visioner 🇦🇪 The UAE is reviewing its role and contributions across multilateral organizations after leaving OPEC but is not planning any additional withdrawals at this time, an Emirati official told Reuters. ➡️ The move is part of a broader strategic reassessment of its memberships, rather than a wave of exits, amid tensions with Saudi Arabia and shifts following the Iran war. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇦🇪 一位阿联酋官员告诉路透社，阿联酋在退出欧佩克后正在审查其在多边组织中的角色和贡献，但目前不打算进行任何额外的撤出。 ➡️ 此举是其更广泛战略重新评估成员资格的一部分，而非在沙特阿拉伯紧张局势和伊朗战争后局势变化背景下的一波退出潮。 推文

text: Visioner 🇸🇰 Slovakia’s Supreme Court has upheld the conviction of Juraj Cintula for a terrorist attack on Prime Minister Robert Fico, confirming his 21-year prison sentence. ➡️ Cintula, 73, shot Fico during a public event on May 15, 2024, and was arrested at the scene, saying his motive was opposition to government policies, including ending military aid to Ukraine and dissolving a special prosecution office. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇸🇰 斯洛伐克最高法院维持了对尤拉伊·辛图拉（Juraj Cintula）因袭击总理罗伯特·菲佐（Robert Fico）而定罪的判决，确认其21年监禁刑期。 ➡️ 73岁的辛图拉于2024年5月15日在一次公开活动中枪击了菲佐，并在现场被捕，他称其动机是反对政府政策，包括停止对乌克兰的军事援助以及解散特别检察官办公室。 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The interception of a Russian UAV by a Ukrainian soldier firing MANPADS from the street in the center of the Ukrainian city of Dnipro this morning. The launcher is equipped with telescopic sights. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049478793614545117/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻） 今天上午，一名乌克兰士兵在乌克兰第聂伯市中心街道上使用便携式防空导弹系统（MANPADS）拦截了一架俄罗斯无人机。发射器配备了望远瞄准镜。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049478793614545117/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The UN Food and Agriculture Organization, the World Food Programme, and Lebanon's Ministry of Agriculture say over 1.2 million people in Lebanon face severe hunger due to the Israel-Hezbollah war. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 联合国粮食及农业组织、世界粮食计划署和黎巴嫩农业部表示，由于以色列与真主党的战争，黎巴嫩有超过120万人面临严重饥饿。 推文

text: Open Source Intel The Iranian rial hit an all-time low today, 1,810,000 to one U.S. dollar. Six weeks of war with the U.S. and Israel have flooded the open market with demand for foreign currency. Reuters. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049478391204602300/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗里亚尔今日跌至历史最低点，兑美元汇率为1,810,000比1。与美国和以色列长达六周的战争导致公开市场对外币的需求激增。路透社。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049478391204602300/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender In apparent jest, California Governor Gavin Newsom posted a photo of himself on a California driver’s license, saying “IN HONOR OF CALIFORNIA’S 175TH ANNIVERSARY, WE WILL BE ROLLING OUT A VERY SPECIAL DRIVER’S LICENSE FOR EVERY CALIFORNIAN THIS SUMMER!” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049476923177214268/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 加利福尼亚州州长加文·纽森（Gavin Newsom）似乎在开玩笑，他发布了一张自己加州驾照的照片，并称：“为纪念加州成立175周年，我们今年夏天将为每位加州人推出一款非常特别的驾照！” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049476923177214268/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel CRAZY FOOTAGE 🔴 LONDON: The Islamist man who had just targeted and stabbed two visibly Jewish men (seriously wounded) near a synagogue chased away 2 London police officers, who initially ran back. Moments later, they used a Taser, causing the attacker to fall to the ground, where one officer appeared to kick him in the head as they moved in to apprehend the terrorist. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 疯狂视频 🔴 伦敦：一名伊斯兰主义男子在犹太教堂附近袭击并刺伤了两名明显的犹太男子（重伤），随后他驱赶了2名伦敦警察，警察起初向后跑。片刻之后，他们使用了泰瑟枪，导致袭击者倒地，其中一名警察在上前逮捕恐怖分子时似乎踢了他的头部。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Secretary of State Rubio warns foreign actors are actively trying to steal U.S. AI technology. "Every country in the world, every foreign actor with the capability, is trying to steal our intellectual property because it benefits them, because we're the best at the world at it. So this is a real threat." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 国务卿卢比奥警告称，外国行为体正积极试图窃取美国人工智能技术。“世界上每个国家，每个有能力的外国行为体，都在试图窃取我们的知识产权，因为这让他们受益，因为我们在这方面是世界领先的。所以这是一个真正的威胁。” 推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - New data from Australian Bureau of Statistics shows Indian-born residents are now Australia's largest foreign-born population, surpassing UK born residents, who had formed the largest single cohort of foreign-born residents at any one time, since 1901. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049475526100680706/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 新闻 - 澳大利亚统计局的最新数据显示，出生于印度的居民现在是澳大利亚最大的外国出生人口群体，超过了自1901年以来一直占据最大单一外国出生人口群体的英国出生居民。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049475526100680706/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Posters were put up in Beirut’s southern suburbs showing Lebanon’s President Joseph Aoun with the Israeli flag behind him. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 贝鲁特南部郊区张贴了海报，显示黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）身后带有以色列国旗。 @wfwitness

text: The first Trump-class battleship is expected to cost over $17 billion, with three ships totaling more than $43 billion, according to early estimates. Source: Axios
text_zh: 根据早期估计，首艘特朗普级战列舰的造价预计将超过170亿美元，三艘战列舰的总造价将超过430亿美元。来源：Axios

text: After Khamenei’s death, Iran moved to a collective wartime leadership centered on the IRGC and Supreme National Security Council. Mojtaba Khamenei is nominally supreme leader but largely symbolic, endorsing decisions rather than making them, while hardline military figures now drive policy on war, security, and foreign affairs. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 哈梅内伊去世后，伊朗转向以伊斯兰革命卫队和最高国家安全委员会为核心的集体战时领导体制。穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊名义上是最高领袖，但很大程度上只是象征性的，他负责背书决策而非制定决策，而强硬派军事人物现在主导着战争、安全和外交政策。来源：路透社

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Hezbollah has released drone footage of southern Lebanon overlayed with the patriotic poem “Good Morning, South”, originally recited by Lebanese Parliament Speaker Nabih Berri. The video blends surveillance imagery with references to the “blue sea”, “green mountain” and “tobacco villages”, reinforcing the group’s emotional and military presence in the border area. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 真主党发布了黎巴嫩南部的无人机画面，并配上了由黎巴嫩议会议长纳比·贝里朗诵的爱国诗歌《早安，南方》。视频将监视影像与对“蔚蓝大海”、“绿色山峦”和“烟草村庄”的描述融合在一起，强化了该组织在边境地区的感官和军事存在。@wfwitness

text: Netanyahu may travel to the U.S. next week, his lawyer says.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡的律师表示，他可能会在下周前往美国。

text: Belgium's Defence Minister Theo Francken: Defense is sexy in Belgium.
text_zh: 比利时国防部长西奥·弗兰肯：国防在比利时很性感。

text: Belgium's Defence Minister Theo Francken: You cannot neglect your armed forces for 30 years, and fix it in 30 months. It takes time.
text_zh: 比利时国防部长西奥·弗兰肯：你不能忽视武装部队30年，然后指望在30个月内修复它。这需要时间。
